name: phpstorm
manual_instructions: PhpStorm → Settings (⌘,) → Tools → Usage Statistics → uncheck 'Send usage statistics' → Apply → restart PhpStorm.
Also Settings → Appearance & Behavior → System Settings → Data Sharing → disable any per-category consents.

If the AI Assistant plugin is installed (check ~/Library/Application Support/JetBrains/PhpStorm*/plugins/ai-assistant*): Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → Data Sharing → set 'Detailed data collection' to 'Disable'. Restart required.
Versioned paths use a year-based suffix (PhpStorm2025.3, PhpStorm2026.1, ...). Glob ~/Library/Application Support/JetBrains/PhpStorm* rather than hardcoding a version.

process_check.if_running: Quit PhpStorm before touching config files — settings are rewritten on shutdown.

persistent_files.note: Feature Usage Statistics queue (telemetry waiting to be uploaded).
IDE logs — may include paths, plugin errors.
Undocumented consent record, resets across versions.

notes: AI Assistant is a non-bundled plugin, disabled by default — only surface its opt-out if the plugin directory exists.
Release-channel toggles (Settings → Appearance & Behavior → System Settings → Updates) can independently send telemetry pings — out of scope here.
